Noob question: How does Karen help carries (e.g.Kath) play more of their cards? Would her retain not make her cards kind of clog up your hand?

If you retain a unit's cards, they won't get added to the draw pile. Therefore, after the deck shuffles, you're not going to pull their cards again (i.e., higher likelihood to draw Kath's cards to reuse).

content: go check urself (im too lazy to)
I rolled an offunit on gdoll banner, it’s the first offunit since I pulled gdoll. If I go to Arachne now, does that offunit also count as offunit for arachne banner hard pity?
If you lost Gdoll and before you didn't had anything or won, then yeah, it's 1/3 (where 3/3 is the guaranteed to get the banner character, aka 90 pulls)
I had pulled gdoll before, so it reset my counter
Then I pulled offunit & now I want to switch banners
It counts for Gdoll/Sorel/Tulu character banner as well of Arachne
Would it count for future banner? If I choose to not pull Arachne
Yup, it's saved for the next one from the same tab
yes
Don't recall what's the name of it, but you can check in the history
Cool thanks! I’m content with Arachne so I guess I’ll wait for next banner then

Hello new mate! Keep in mind that in this game, when u pull on limited Awakeners, you can lose 2 times before you get the SSR u want. There is a 33/66 % formula. The 3rd SSR you pull, if you lost 2 times, will be the one you want for sure
"Soft" pity is at 30, hard pity at 90 pulls
Yes thanks I’m aware! My question was, if losing 1st time on one banner will count for another banner. Which people have answered yes
Yes indeed!
Don't know if you already know this, limited Wheels works differently. There is a 50/50 there, so "soft" is at 30 and hard at 60
Pity always carries on also there
